'''Bakur RepulsorCorp''', or '''BRC''', was a company on [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] that produced [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]]. They were responsible for the majority of Bakura's exports, and during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupation of Bakura, the BRC factory was considered to be the most likely target in the event of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack.

The planetary sector that contained BRC was represented in the [[Bakuran Senate]] by [[Orn Belden]].

{{Company-stub}}
